buildCmd: rsync -a --exclude 'BackButton.tsx' --exclude 'BottomNav.tsx' --exclude 'FoxLottie.tsx' --exclude 'FoxAvatar.tsx' components/sisi/ .design-sync/build-src/sisi/ && cp .design-sync/build-src-fixed/FoxAvatar.tsx .design-sync/build-src/sisi/FoxAvatar.tsx && node .design-sync/build-src-fixed/fix-default-exports.mjs .design-sync/build-src/sisi && npx tailwindcss -i app/globals.css -o .design-sync/tailwind-build/compiled.raw.css --config tailwind.config.ts && cat .design-sync/build-src-fixed/fonts-import.css .design-sync/tailwind-build/compiled.raw.css .design-sync/build-src-fixed/fonts-append.css > .design-sync/tailwind-build/compiled.css
